title: Trump Earns $636 Million As Memecoin Investors Lose $3.8 Billion: Report
summary_full: The report found that 988,905 crypto wallets, representing roughly two out of every three buyers of the $TRUMP memecoin, were at a loss by the end of June.
summary_public: The report found that 988,905 crypto wallets, representing roughly two out of every three buyers of the $TRUMP memecoin, were at a loss by the end of June.
